headline: BlackRock Expands Access to U.S. Leveraged Loan Market with Index ETF
summary: NEW YORK, March 04, 2026--BlackRock today announced the launch of the iShares Broad USD Floating Rate Loan ETF (CBOE: USLN), the firm’s first index-based ETF providing access to U.S. dollar-denominated leveraged loans. The U.S. leveraged loan market has grown to $1.4 trillion – now similar in size to the high yield bond market – offering greater opportunity for scalable, index-based exposure.1

headline: BlackRock Reshapes Power Exposure With AES Buyout And Naturgy Exit
summary: BlackRock, through its Global Infrastructure Partners division, is leading a consortium to acquire AES Corporation in one of the larger recent infrastructure buyouts. The deal centers on growing electricity demand linked to data center expansion and AI related power needs. Separately, BlackRock has fully exited its position in Spanish energy company Naturgy, closing out its prior stake. These moves highlight a reshaping of BlackRock’s energy and infrastructure exposure that could influence...

headline: Trump says ‘401(k)s are way up’ — but workers are tapping them at record rates
summary: President Donald Trump touted rising 401(k) balances in his State of the Union speech. Here's where those retirement accounts stand.
